status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: In some cases, the AM may not be able to perform a readiness check for a container. For example, if a docker container is using a custom network type, its IP may not be reachable from the AM. In this case, the AM could request a new container to perform a readiness command, and use the exit status of the container to determine whether the readiness check succeeded or not.

comments.body: Also, in this case, the readiness check is only performed until it succeeds (as opposed to the other readiness checks which are performed at an interval forever). I did this because it did not seem like the AM should keep requesting new containers forever.
